title: HSBC International Student Account
summary: A specialised current account for international students that allows you to manage daily expenses and make local payments fee-free.

title: Barclays Student Additions Account
summary: A high street bank account offering free everyday banking services and mobile app access to help students manage their money.

title: Revolut Standard Account
summary: A digital multi-currency account that lets students convert money and send international transfers with low fees and competitive exchange rates.

title: 16-25 Railcard
summary: A national travel card that saves you one third on rail fares across Great Britain throughout the year.

title: 18+ Student Oyster photocard
summary: A travel card for students living in London that provides thirty percent off adult-rate travelcards and bus passes.

title: UNiDAYS
summary: A free digital platform providing verified students with exclusive discounts on fashion, technology, and food brands.

title: Student Beans
summary: A free student loyalty network offering digital discount codes to use at thousands of online and high street retailers.

title: NHS GP Registration
summary: Free registration with a local doctor surgery to receive routine medical consultations and prescriptions in the UK.

title: NHS HC2 Certificate
summary: A certificate that helps low-income students get full support for dental care, eye tests, and prescription costs.

title: National Insurance Number
summary: A unique government identifier required for any international student who wants to work part-time or pay taxes legally in the UK.

title: Biometric Residence Permit
summary: The identity document confirming your visa status and right to study in the UK which must be collected shortly after arrival.

title: Council Tax Exemption
summary: A certificate obtained from your university that proves you are a full-time student and exempts your household from local council taxes.

title: VOXI Student Plan
summary: A flexible monthly rolling SIM plan with unlimited social media data that does not require a long-term UK contract.

title: Giffgaff Student SIM
summary: A mobile network offering contract-free SIM cards with extra data allowances specifically for verified students.

title: TOTUM student card
summary: The NUS backed student discount card that unlocks deals across shops, food and travel.
